SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao

Interface DigSiteGridDao

public interface DigSiteGridDao
Data Access Object interface for DigSiteGrid entity. Provides methods for managing game board data and retrieving grids with their associated squares.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    delete(DigSiteGrid digSiteGrid)
    Deletes a dig site grid from the database.
    LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares>
    getMostRecentDigSiteGridWithSquaresByPlayerId(long playerId)
     
    long
    insert(DigSiteGrid digSiteGrid)
    Inserts a new dig site grid into the database, typically when starting a new game.
    LiveData<DigSiteGrid>
    selectById(long id)
    Retrieves a single dig site grid by its primary key.
    LiveData<List<DigSiteGrid>>
    selectByPlayerId(long playerId)
    Retrieves all dig site grids for a specific player as observable live data.
    LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares>
    selectWithSquares(long id)
    Retrieves a dig site grid with all its associated squares using a database view.
    int
    updateRemainingBrushes(long id, int remainingBrushes)
    Updates the remaining brushes count for a specific dig site grid.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(DigSiteGrid digSiteGrid)
      Inserts a new dig site grid into the database, typically when starting a new game.
      Parameters:
      digSiteGrid - Dig site grid to insert.
      Returns:
      Generated primary key ID.

    • selectById

      LiveData<DigSiteGrid> selectById(long id)
      Retrieves a single dig site grid by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - Grid ID.
      Returns:
      Dig site grid with the specified ID, or null if not found.

    • selectByPlayerId

      LiveData<List<DigSiteGrid>> selectByPlayerId(long playerId)
      Retrieves all dig site grids for a specific player as observable live data.
      Parameters:
      playerId - Player (user) ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of grids for the specified player.

    • selectWithSquares

      LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> selectWithSquares(long id)
      Retrieves a dig site grid with all its associated squares using a database view. This is a transactional query that joins grid and square data.
      Parameters:
      id - Grid ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the grid with squares POJO.

    • getMostRecentDigSiteGridWithSquaresByPlayerId

      LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> getMostRecentDigSiteGridWithSquaresByPlayerId(long playerId)

    • updateRemainingBrushes

      int updateRemainingBrushes(long id, int remainingBrushes)
      Updates the remaining brushes count for a specific dig site grid.
      Parameters:
      id - Grid ID.
      remainingBrushes - New remaining brushes count.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated (should be 1).

    • delete

      int delete(DigSiteGrid digSiteGrid)
      Deletes a dig site grid from the database. Associated squares will be cascade deleted.
      Parameters:
      digSiteGrid - Dig site grid to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted (should be 1).
